chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 909 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 10-11-2022 Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Even on the last date of hearing, brief was held on his behalf and the matter was adjourned as a last chance with note of caution if no one appears on behalf of the petitioner on the next date or Counsel for the petitioner avoids to proceed with the matter, instant petition will be heard and decided with the assistance of learned AAG. The petitioner, through instant petition, seeks mutation of foti khata of the subject land in her favour as per terms and conditions made in the compromise. As per Annexure ‘B’ available at Page-11 of the memo of petition, the alleged settlement is occurred in 2000 before the Additional Commissioner-I, Sukkur Division; hence, appropriate remedy lies before the same authority if the settlement has not attained its finality in terms of any mutation. This petition is, therefore, dismissed being not maintainable. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
